title: AnvilCore 🔨
description: AnvilCore is a required library for all SmartStreamLabs mods, handling shared code and core features.
body:
🔨 AnvilCore

AnvilCore is the official core library for all SmartStreamLabs mods.

It contains the shared backend systems, utilities, and internal APIs that power multiple SmartStreamLabs projects. Instead of every mod including the same code separately, AnvilCore centralizes these systems into a single library.

This ensures that mods using the same shared code remain compatible and work together without conflicts.

What AnvilCore provides

Shared utility systems used across SmartStreamLabs mods

Internal APIs and backend frameworks

Common code libraries and helpers

Improved mod compatibility and stability

Library Notice

⚠️ AnvilCore is a library mod and does not add gameplay content.

It is automatically required by many SmartStreamLabs mods, and must be installed for them to function properly.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚙️ What AnvilCore Provides**

🧩 Shared utility systems

🔄 Common code framework for all SmartStreamLabs mods

🛠️ Performance-optimized backend handling

🔗 Cross-mod compatibility support

📦 Centralized dependency management

🚀 Streamlined updates across supported mods

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

If you are not using a SmartStreamLabs mod that requires AnvilCore, you do not need to install it.


![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🎯 Why Use a Core Library?**

By separating shared systems into AnvilCore, SmartStreamLabs mods can:

Stay lightweight

Receive faster updates

Maintain better compatibility

Reduce duplicate code

Improve overall stability

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**AnvilCore is actively maintained and designed to grow alongside future SmartStreamLabs projects.**

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
